top_findings.summary: The skill requests read, write, and edit access to all files in the project (globs: '**/*.*') and requires reading/writing to a local memory file (.claude/context/memory/learnings.md). While a full-stack developer persona may need access to code files for review and refactoring, unrestricted access to every file in the project (including sensitive configuration files, credentials, or personal data) is excessive and unrelated to its primary purpose of providing coding standards expertise. Additionally, the memory protocol could lead to unintended data persistence or exposure of project-specific information.
